title: Fix YouTube channel connection status, fix downloads, and show principal IDs in admin panel

requirements.text: Fix the YouTube channel connection status display so that when a user has already connected their YouTube channel (i.e., valid Google OAuth credentials are stored in the backend), the ChannelConnection component correctly reflects the connected state instead of showing 'not connected'. Investigate the useYouTubeChannel hook and the OAuthCallback flow to ensure the stored credentials are being read and the connected status is correctly derived and returned.
acceptanceCriteria: After a user completes the YouTube OAuth flow, the ChannelConnection component shows the channel as connected on subsequent page loads
The useYouTubeChannel hook returns a connected status when valid credentials exist in the backend
The connected state persists across page refreshes without requiring the user to reconnect

requirements.text: Fix the clip download functionality so that clicking the download button on a ClipCard successfully triggers a file download in the browser. Investigate the useDownloadClip hook to ensure it correctly fetches the download URL from the backend and that the programmatic browser download trigger (e.g., anchor element click) works as expected. Ensure error states are surfaced to the user if download fails.

quotes: I still can't download from the website

acceptanceCriteria: Clicking the download button on a ClipCard triggers a file download in the browser
The download hook fetches a valid URL from the backend before triggering the download
If the download fails, an error toast or message is shown to the user

requirements.text: In the admin panel's user management section (UserStatusManagement component), display each user's full Principal ID alongside their existing user ID. Add a copy-to-clipboard button next to the Principal ID so admins can easily copy it. The Principal ID should be visible in the user list/search results and in any user detail view within the component.

quotes: make it show the user principal id in the admin panel in the user and clip management section so I can copy it from the app

acceptanceCriteria: Each user entry in the UserStatusManagement component displays the user's full Principal ID
A copy-to-clipboard button is present next to each Principal ID
Clicking the copy button copies the full Principal ID to the clipboard
The Principal ID is visible in user search results within the component

requirements.text: In the admin panel's clip management section (any clip listing/management view available to admins), display the owner's full Principal ID for each clip alongside existing owner information. Add a copy-to-clipboard button next to each Principal ID so admins can easily copy it.

quotes: make it show the user principal id in the admin panel in the user and clip management section so I can copy it from the app

acceptanceCriteria: Each clip entry in the admin clip management section displays the clip owner's full Principal ID
A copy-to-clipboard button is present next to each Principal ID
Clicking the copy button copies the full Principal ID to the clipboard

constraints: Do not modify files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Do not change the backend data schema or existing actor interfaces unless strictly required to fix the download or YouTube connection bugs
nonGoals: Adding new YouTube OAuth scopes or changing the OAuth provider configuration
Adding Principal ID display outside of the admin panel
